subcodes.first_line: O ye homeless ones of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! Ye are homeless and afflicted; ye are displaced and dispossessed of all
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آوارگان عبدالبهاء آواره اید آزرده اید بی سر و سامانید زیرا خانه و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation
